violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety that is registered/licensed with the RIDOH Center for Food Protection. Application printed for the PIC at the time of inspection. PIC is to submit application as soon as possible. New Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2024
Food items were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2024

At the time of inspection, PIC could not provide proof that the establishment employs a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety with RIDOH Center for Food Protection at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 12/25/2023
